ba._comment: BA agent: runs business analysis & drafts definitions_of_done.md. Uses 'gemini run <prompt>'

dev._comment: Dev agent: agy CLI. model_name sets ANTIGRAVITY_MODEL env var. Default: gemini-2.5-flash

devops._comment: DevOps agent: local ollama CLI. model_name is passed as 'ollama run <model_name>'. mcp_config points to Linear MCP for ticket updates
